basis: One medium and one high clean failure preserved under this level; no promoted solver.
objective: Resolve whether the board evolves by action count, wall clock, or shared animation before attempting another coordinate policy.
required_first_checks: Read frontier_brief.md and run the preserved compact probe on separately created environments.
Compare no-op, integer action, and coordinate action sequences at matched action counts and elapsed times.
Record the full documented env.actions schema once; do not repeatedly recalibrate arbitrary coordinate scales.
search_change: Use fresh environments rather than sibling clones when testing temporal isolation.
Build the state key from the two cyan component locations, the board occupancy quotient, and the remaining action-budget indicator.
Only after the transition clock is identified, search short action sequences under the observed 61-action budget.
known_unverified_observations: The frame contains a large alternating board, two cyan components, lower glyphs, and a separate magenta object.
Previous coordinate probes changed only the one-pixel action-budget indicator.
Apparent cyan motion correlated with elapsed probing and affected later clones, so clone-local causality was not established.
